zh_summary: 確認所有可能接觸人體的用水具備基本安全與清澈度，包括飲用、烹調、洗手與淋浴用水。重點是用現場測試驗證 turbidity 與 coliforms，避免水質失控影響健康。
zh_specs: 適用於 delivered to the project 且 intended for human contact 的用水，如 drinking, cooking and dishwashing, handwashing, showering or bathing。
Turbidity is less than or equal to 1.0 NTU, FTU or FNU。
Coliforms are not detected in any 100 ml sample。
以 on-site tests 驗證水質 performance。
Multifamily residential projects 可在不測 dwelling units 下達 Bronze or Silver，但 Gold or Platinum 需測 dwelling units。

zh_summary: 確保飲用水符合健康導向的化學成分限制，並涵蓋部分有機物與 pesticides 風險。考點在於 drinking water dispenser 的配置，以及各項金屬、氮化物與農藥門檻需達標。
zh_specs: 至少提供 one drinking water dispenser，且每個 dwelling unit 另需 one drinking water dispenser per dwelling unit。
Arsenic ≤ 0.01 mg/L；Cadmium ≤ 0.003 mg/L；Chromium (total) ≤ 0.05 mg/L。
Copper ≤ 2 mg/L；Fluoride ≤ 1.5 mg/L；Lead ≤ 0.01 mg/L；Mercury (total) ≤ 0.006 mg/L；Nickel ≤ 0.07 mg/L。
Nitrate ≤ 50 mg/L as Nitrate (11 mg/L as Nitrogen)；Nitrite ≤ 3 mg/L as Nitrite (0.9 mg/L as Nitrogen)。
municipal water quality report 需 issued not more than one year before project registration，且 covers at least two of the pesticides below。

pesticides 門檻例：Aldrin and Dieldrin (combined): 0.00003 mg/L or less；Atrazine: 0.1 mg/L or less；Carbofuran: 0.007 mg/L or less；Chlordane: 0.0002 mg/L or less；2,4-Dichlorophenoxyacetic acid (2,4-D): 0.03 mg/L or less；DDT and metabolites: 0.001 mg/L or less。

zh_summary: 要求專案主動監測飲用水的化學與生物指標，並建立 Legionella 管理計畫。重點是定期抽樣、追蹤接近 W02 門檻的參數，以及管理會循環並霧化的水系統。
zh_specs: 水質參數 sampled at intervals of no less than once per year。
年度監測項目包含 Turbidity、pH、Residual (free) chlorine。
Total coliforms 只在 residual chlorine is below detection limits 時檢測。
任何水質參數達 W02 Part 1 門檻的 80% or above，需在該位置 at least annually 追蹤。
Legionella management plan 需涵蓋 hot water systems, cooling towers, decorative fountains，以及 project 控制下 water is recirculated and aerosolized 的設備或空間。
Legionella plan 需包含 roles、water system inventory 與 process flow diagrams of systems within the project boundary。

zh_summary: 聚焦飲用水的味道、氣味與外觀，降低影響接受度的 aesthetic chemicals。WELL AP 準備時要記得這是 optimization，核心是 human consumption 用水的 taste-related thresholds。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 2 Pt。
Aluminum ≤ 0.2 mg/L；Chloride ≤ 250 mg/L；Copper ≤ 1 mg/L。
Manganese ≤ 0.05 mg/L；Iron ≤ 0.3 mg/L；Silver≤ 0.1 mg/L。
Sodium ≤ 270 mg/L；Sulfate ≤ 250 mg/L；Sulfide ≤ 0.05 mg/L；Zinc ≤5 mg/L。
Total Dissolved Solids (TDS) ≤ 500 mg/L；Free Chlorine ≤ 1.25 mg/L。
WELL Core Guidance 要在 whole building 達成，並從 non-leased spaces sampling。

zh_summary: 將飲用水品質從一次性達標提升為持續管理，包括 Performance Verification 前預測試、定期維護與結果透明揭露。重點是讓 occupants 能看到最新 sampling 結果與處理設備資訊。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 2 Pt | WELL Core: 2 Pt 可透過 Water quality pre-test 評估與維持水質。
first-time registered projects 需 at least one month before Performance Verification 預測試。
pre-test 參數包含 Turbidity、Coliforms、pH、Total Dissolved Solids (TDS)、Total Chlorine、Residual (free) chlorine、Arsenic、Lead、Copper、Nitrate、Benzene。
Sampling 時若有 filters or other water treatment devices，需 removed, if present。
WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 1 Pt 可透過 Promote Drinking Water Transparency 取得。
飲水來源附近或 occupant 可用網站需 prominent display 最近 sampling 的 water quality results、date of testing、WELL thresholds compliance，以及 treatment technologies 和最近 maintenance/filter cartridge replacement 日期。

zh_summary: 透過容易取得且維護良好的飲水設備，鼓勵 occupants 以飲用水取代較不健康的飲料選擇。考點是 dispenser 的可及距離、每層配置與補水瓶設計。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 1 Pt。
適用於 All Spaces except Dwelling Units。
At least one drinking water dispenser，且 minimum one per floor。
drinking water dispenser 位於所有 regularly occupied floor area 與 all dining areas 的 100 ft(30 m) walk distance 內。
dispenser 供水需 directly piped through the building’s water supply，或 stored in containers designed for refilling。
All newly installed drinking water fountains are designed for water bottle-refilling。

zh_summary: 降低建築中因滲水、冷凝或內部漏水造成 bacteria 與 mold 生長的風險。此 feature 從 building envelope、interior materials 到營運期 moisture management plan 建立完整防線。
zh_specs: Part 1: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 2 Pt，building envelope 需 minimize moisture intrusion and accumulation。
construction occurs after registration 的專案需驗證 site drainage and storm water management during building construction phase。
需進行 Air tightness testing to assess water vapor transfer。
Entryway design 至少納入 at least three strategies 以減少水進入或滲透建築。
Part 2: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 2 Pt，interior spaces 需處理 moisture-sensitive building materials、moisture-resistant materials or finishes，以及 cold surfaces condensation。
Part 3: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 2 Pt，moisture management plan 需包含 periodic inspections、water pipe leaks inspection protocol，以及 occupants and tenants 通報 mold or water damage 的系統。

zh_summary: 確保廁所與洗手設施能支持不同使用者需求，並透過減少接觸點提升 hygiene。重點包含 menstrual products、hands-free 設備、感應式 faucet 與有效洗手所需的 sink 尺寸。
zh_specs: Part 1: WELL Certification: 2 Pt | WELL Core: 2 Pt，適用於 All Spaces except Dwelling Units。
women’s and single-user bathrooms 的 stalls 需提供 trash receptacles；若 toilet paper cannot be flushed down toilets，all bathroom stalls 都需 trash receptacles。
women’s and single-user bathrooms 需提供 sanitary pads, tampons and/or other menstrual products，at no cost 或 subsidized by at least 50%。
每個 toilet stall 需提供 hook, shelf or equivalent storage support。
Part 2: WELL Certification: 1 Pt | WELL Core: 1 Pt，toilets 需 hands-free flushing，並提供 contactless soap dispensers and hand drying，users can exit the bathroom hands-free。
Part 3: newly installed sinks 的 sink basin 至少 9 inches(23 cm) in width and length，water column from the sink to the basin 至少 6 inches(15 cm)。

zh_summary: 鼓勵以 onsite non-potable water reuse 節約水資源，同時避免污染 potable water lines 或造成口腔、呼吸暴露風險。核心要求是建立安全計畫，清楚定義角色、法規、流程與系統邊界。
zh_specs: WELL Certification: 2 Pt | WELL Core: 2 Pt。
專案需 implement a safety plan for non-potable water capture and reuse。
安全計畫需列出 design, operations, maintenance and third-party inspection 的 key team roles。
安全計畫需列出 jurisdiction 內 applicable codes and regulations，涵蓋 design, commissioning, and approval of operation。
需提供 process flow diagram，顯示 non-potable water sources, conveyances, storage units, treatment。
目的在於 conserve water，同時不 compromising the health of the building occupants。
